difficulty.reason: 150+ days to maturity, long season, deep planting technique, requires patience

growth_stages.name: Transplant
growth_stages.look_for: Thin pencil-thick seedlings dropped into deep holes

prompt.en: Drop the skinny leek into the deep hole -- don't fill it in! Just water gently!
prompt.da: Lad den tynde porre falde ned i det dybe hul -- fyld det ikke op! Bare vand forsigtigt!

growth_stages.name: Slow Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Leek slowly getting thicker, flat leaves growing taller

prompt.en: Is it as thick as your pinky finger yet? This one takes ALL summer to grow big!
prompt.da: Er den saa tyk som din lillefinger endnu? Denne tager HELE sommeren om at vokse stor!

growth_stages.name: Thickening
growth_stages.look_for: Leek getting noticeably thicker, white stem visible in the hole

prompt.en: Peek down the hole -- see how the white part is growing? That's the yummy bit!
prompt.da: Kig ned i hullet -- ser du, hvordan den hvide del vokser? Det er den laekre del!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Thick leek ready to dig up, at least thumb-width

prompt.en: Loosen the soil with a fork, then PULL! Look how long the white part is! We waited ALL year for this!
prompt.da: Loesn jorden med en greb, saa TRAEK! Se hvor lang den hvide del er! Vi har ventet HELE aaret paa dette!

human_readable.en: Water regularly. Keep evenly moist but don't waterlog the planting holes.
human_readable.da: Vand regelmaessigt. Hold jaevnt fugtig, men lad ikke plantehullerne staa i vand.

harvest.notes: Harvest from autumn into winter. Very hardy -- survives frost. Plant 15cm deep for blanching (white stems).

companion_plants.notes: Allium: compatible with other alliums, but inhibits legume nitrogen fixation.

message.en: Leeks need steady moisture to keep growing -- water the bed!
message.da: Porrer har brug for jaevn fugtighed for at vokse -- vand bedet!
